hero_subtitle: Discover personalized welfare scheme recommendations using AI. Tell us about yourself and we'll find the best schemes matching your profile — with eligibility scoring, gap analysis, and explainable results.
features_subtitle: Our intelligent system goes beyond simple search to provide personalized, explainable recommendations.
feature_ai_desc: Our NLP engine analyzes your profile to match you with the most relevant government schemes.
feature_gap_desc: Understand exactly what criteria you meet and what steps you need to become fully eligible.
feature_alerts_desc: Never miss an application deadline with timely notifications for your saved schemes.
feature_autofill_desc: Upload documents and let our system extract your demographic details automatically.
step_1_desc: Enter your details or describe yourself naturally — age, income, occupation, state, goals.
step_2_desc: Our recommendation engine matches your profile against 500+ government schemes using NLP and rule-based scoring.
step_3_desc: View ranked schemes with match percentages, eligibility status, missing criteria, and direct apply links.
cta_subtitle: Join thousands of citizens who have discovered schemes they didn't know they were eligible for.
footer_tagline: AI-powered government scheme recommendation system. Helping citizens discover welfare schemes they are eligible for.
footer_about_text: YojanaMitraAI is an AI-powered platform that uses NLP and eligibility matching to recommend government schemes personalized for every citizen.
footer_copy: All rights reserved. Built for public welfare.
find_subtitle: Describe yourself naturally or fill in your details — our AI will find the best schemes for you.
search_placeholder_long: Example: "I am a 22-year-old female student from Karnataka, SC category, family income below 2 lakhs. I am looking for scholarships and education loans."
no_schemes_found: No schemes found. Try adjusting your criteria or add more scheme data.
name: Full Name
welcome_back_sub: Sign in to access your scheme dashboard
create_account_sub: Join YojanaMitraAI to discover your eligible schemes
admin_subtitle: Manage government schemes and eligibility rules
access_denied_text: You do not have admin privileges to access this panel.
